noFindingRecord.reason: No actionable A2A scheduler finding: eval:a2a remains single-fire and legacy digest overlap remains disabled. Counter-window and grounding Phase O data are unavailable in the accessible evidence for this run, so counter-derived rates were not computed and grounding remains a telemetry gap.
noFindingRecord.evidence: task_run_ledger id 208705 shows eval:a2a RUN_DELIVERED once on 2026-06-24; 2026-05-30 through 2026-06-24 are single-fire after the 2026-05-29 duplicate; dynamic_task_defs.id='harness-fit-digest' count=0 and no legacy digest ledger runs exist. No 2026-06-24 raw counter_window block existed before this evaluation, and local telemetry endpoints require session authentication; grounding-phase-o is recorded as no-data rather than inferred as healthy.
